data.title: This Tech Company Is Turning Cannabis Shopping Into Spotify - Are Retailers Ready?
data.description: With cutting-edge technology and a consumer-centric approach, Jane Technologies is transforming how consumers purchase cannabis.

data.title: Amazon AWS CEO Stands Firm On 5-Day Office Policy — Opponents Can Head For The Exit Door: 'There Are Other Companies Around'
data.description: Amazon's AWS CEO Matt Garman defended the new five-day in-office policy, urging those opposed to consider other jobs, as most employees he spoke with support it.

data.title: Kamala Harris Repeats Promise To Get Rid Of 'Unnecessary Degree Requirements' — 'I Will Challenge The Private Sector To Do The Same'
data.description: Kamala Harris pledged to eliminate unnecessary degree requirements for federal jobs and encouraged the private sector to do the same.

data.title: Sold Out Before Hitting Shelves: Why Did AYR Wellness Snatch Up This Local Cannabis Brand?
data.description: How a cannabis brand went from a garage startup to an MSO acquisition, selling out before hitting shelves. Co-founder explains.

data.title: Trump Assasination Suspect Wants Judge Aileen Cannon To Recuse Herself: The Ex-President Has 'Bolstered The Perception That The Court Is Partial In His Favor'
data.description: Ryan Routh, charged with attempting to assassinate former President Donald Trump, requested the recusal of Judge Aileen Cannon due to potential bias, as Trump appointed and publicly praised her.
